description: This C# source file defines the class InMemoryLinkedModuleRepository, which implements in-memory persistence for linked modules, including EF mappings, throughput equations, data input values, and replication outcomes, used within the DemoAssetDotnetApi project.

classes.name: InMemoryLinkedModuleRepository
classes.description: A sealed class implementing ILinkedModuleRepository for in-memory storage of linked module data, including EF mappings, throughput equations, data inputs, and replication outcomes.

methods.name: ListEfMappingsAsync
methods.description: Retrieves a list of EF source mappings filtered by site and optional asset ID.

methods.name: UpsertEfMappingsAsync
methods.description: Inserts or updates EF source mappings for a given site and asset.

methods.name: ListThroughputEquationsAsync
methods.description: Retrieves throughput equations filtered by site, optional asset ID, and reporting year.

methods.name: UpsertThroughputEquationsBulkAsync
methods.description: Performs bulk insert or update of throughput equations grouped by asset.

methods.name: UpsertThroughputEquationsAsync
methods.description: Inserts or updates throughput equations for a specific site, asset, and reporting year.

methods.name: ListThroughputReportingYearsAsync
methods.description: Lists reporting years available for throughput data for a specific site and asset.

methods.name: UpsertDataInputValueAsync
methods.description: Inserts or updates a data input value for a specific site, asset, and reporting year.

methods.name: ListDataInputValuesAsync
methods.description: Retrieves data input values for a specific site and asset.

methods.name: UpsertReplicationOutcomeAsync
methods.description: Stores or updates the outcome of a replication operation.

methods.name: GetReplicationOutcomeAsync
methods.description: Retrieves the outcome of a specific replication operation.
